## protectHttpHandler() function

Wraps an HTTP handler with synchronous request authorization.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function protectHttpHandler(input: {
  handler: HttpHandler;
  authorize: RequestAuthorizer;
}): HttpHandler;
```
